A.rationale: Correct chunking, ValueError on n<=0, empty-list works, clean Args/Raises docstring, tight commentary, no false claims.

B.rationale: Same correct core; richest docstring with verified doctests, but longest and the closing persona question adds narration.

C.rationale: Correct and leanest; docstring lacks Args/Returns detail and TypeError-guard suggestion slightly over-engineers, but accurate.

notes: All three share an identical correct implementation. A wins on best docstring-completeness-to-length balance; B's doctests are nice but it is verbose; C is tightest but thinnest docstring.
